text: Being here, I feel curiosity stir within me. The lab-like setting, bright lights, and glass partitions evoke the spirit of inquiry. Now, standing before this vibrant wall of "R+D"—responsive and rapidly evolving development—I sense the pulse of creativity and possibility. I am aware that I am in a space where thought, innovation, and questioning are invited, even celebrated. It makes me feel simultaneously grounded and open-ended, just like the concept of research itself.
